ingredients.name: Salami
ingredients.cut_style: thin round slices, 2-3cm diameter, slightly curled edges from heat
ingredients.bake_state: baked, edges slightly crispy and curled upward, some oil pooling
ingredients.realism_notes: Each slice slightly different size. Some overlap. Edges darker from caramelization. Small pools of orange oil around slices. Not perfectly round — natural casing shape. White fat specks visible through translucent red meat.

ingredients.name: Hinterschinken
ingredients.cut_style: small rustic pieces and strips of Italian prosciutto cotto
ingredients.bake_state: lightly baked, edges slightly dried
ingredients.realism_notes: Small pieces of cooked ham, 1-3cm each. Some curled, some flat. Light pink to pale brown. Scattered casually like a pizzaiolo would. Some pieces slightly overlapping.

ingredients.name: Parmaschinken
ingredients.cut_style: paper-thin large slices, loosely draped with natural folds and wrinkles
ingredients.bake_state: raw, placed after baking — fresh and uncooked appearance
ingredients.realism_notes: Added AFTER baking, so it looks fresh and raw, not cooked. Delicate, translucent edges. Natural marbling of white fat veins through deep rose-pink meat. Loosely gathered, not flat. 3-4 large slices casually draped. Looks premium and artisanal.

ingredients.name: Speck
ingredients.cut_style: small baked lardons or cubetti, not raw bacon strips
ingredients.bake_state: well baked, crispy, rendered fat
ingredients.realism_notes: Small cubes or short strips, 1-2cm. Crispy and golden-brown. Mix of lean red parts and rendered white fat. Some pieces darker than others. Scattered randomly, not in lines. Slight sheen from rendered fat.

ingredients.name: Hackfleisch
ingredients.cut_style: small irregular crumbles, broken up by hand
ingredients.bake_state: fully cooked, browned, some pieces slightly charred
ingredients.realism_notes: Crumbled ground meat, not formed into balls. Varying sizes from 3mm to 1cm. Mix of dark brown and medium brown. Some pieces slightly charred. Spread relatively evenly but with natural clustering. Looks like seasoned Italian sausage meat crumbled over pizza.

ingredients.name: Sucuk
ingredients.cut_style: round slices, slightly thicker than salami, 2-3cm diameter
ingredients.bake_state: baked, slightly crispy edges, oil released
ingredients.realism_notes: Darker and more rustic than salami. Deep burgundy-red color. Coarser texture visible. Slight orange oil sheen. Edges curl up slightly from baking. Each slice slightly different. Spice particles visible on surface. Denser and meatier looking than salami.

ingredients.name: Thunfisch
ingredients.cut_style: loose flaky chunks, broken up naturally
ingredients.bake_state: lightly baked, slightly dried on surface
ingredients.realism_notes: Canned tuna style, flaked apart. Small mounds scattered across pizza. Not mushy or paste-like — visible flaky texture. Light beige to pale pink-brown. Some pieces slightly darker from oven. Natural irregular distribution, slightly denser in center.

ingredients.name: Sardellen
ingredients.cut_style: whole small fillets, laid lengthwise
ingredients.bake_state: baked into pizza, slightly melted into sauce
ingredients.realism_notes: Very few pieces — sardellen are intense so used sparingly. 4-6 small fillets, 3-4cm long. Dark brown, glossy from oil. Some draped in slight S-curves, not perfectly straight. Arranged somewhat radially from center. Premium look, not overcrowded.

ingredients.name: Lachs
ingredients.cut_style: thin delicate slices or small fine pieces, sashimi-quality appearance
ingredients.bake_state: raw or barely warmed, placed after baking — fresh appearance
ingredients.realism_notes: Added AFTER baking for premium look. Translucent salmon-orange color. Delicate thin slices with visible fat marbling. Some pieces slightly folded or rolled. Looks like smoked salmon or gravlax. Premium restaurant quality. Not cooked-looking.

ingredients.name: Champignons
ingredients.cut_style: thin slices showing classic T-shape cross section, 2-3mm thick
ingredients.bake_state: baked, slightly shrunken and golden
ingredients.realism_notes: Classic mushroom T-shape when sliced. Thin and delicate. Golden-brown from baking, not raw white. Some slices show the gills (dark underside). Varying sizes. Scattered naturally, not arranged. Some overlap. Slight browning on edges.

ingredients.name: Steinpilze
ingredients.cut_style: thick rustic slices, 4-5mm, larger and more substantial than champignons
ingredients.bake_state: baked, deep golden brown, slightly caramelized
ingredients.realism_notes: More premium and rustic than regular mushrooms. Thicker slices with visible porous stem texture. Rich dark brown cap, lighter stem. Some pieces show the distinctive spongy underside. Fewer pieces but each one more prominent. Woodsy, earthy appearance.

ingredients.name: Peperoni
ingredients.cut_style: thin rings and some split pieces, 1-2cm diameter rings
ingredients.bake_state: baked, slightly softened and blistered
ingredients.realism_notes: Mix of green and red rings. Seeds visible inside some rings. Not too many — peperoni are spicy so used moderately. Some rings intact, some broken into half-rings. Slight char marks on some pieces. Glossy from oil. Thin-walled pepper rings.

ingredients.name: Paprika
ingredients.cut_style: short fine strips 3-4cm long, julienne cut
ingredients.bake_state: baked, slightly softened, some edges charred
ingredients.realism_notes: Mix of red, yellow, and green strips for color variety. Cut into thin strips, not chunky cubes. Each strip slightly curved naturally. Some with slight char marks. Colorful and appetizing. Not perfectly uniform — hand-cut look. Bell pepper, not chili.

ingredients.name: Zwiebeln
ingredients.cut_style: thin half-rings and separated ring segments, translucent
ingredients.bake_state: baked, caramelized, golden-translucent
ingredients.realism_notes: Thin rings separated into arcs and individual segments. Golden and caramelized from baking — not raw white. Semi-translucent. Some pieces darker (more caramelized) than others. Natural random scatter. Delicate and thin, not chunky.

ingredients.name: Knoblauch
ingredients.cut_style: very thin small slices or fine mince, delicate
ingredients.bake_state: baked, lightly golden, roasted
ingredients.realism_notes: Used VERY sparingly — garlic is potent. Tiny thin slices or minced pieces. Light golden from roasting. Some pieces slightly darker. Distributed sparsely and irregularly. Should look like accent, not main topping. Paper-thin slices where visible.

ingredients.name: Oliven
ingredients.cut_style: sliced into rings 3-4mm thick, showing hollow center
ingredients.bake_state: baked, slightly wrinkled and darkened
ingredients.realism_notes: Black olives cut into rings — NEVER whole spheres. Each ring shows the hollow center. Mix of thicker and thinner rings. Some slightly broken. Dark purple-black, glossy from oil. A few pieces may be halves instead of rings. Slight wrinkle texture from baking.

ingredients.name: Artischocken
ingredients.cut_style: small quartered hearts, showing layered leaf structure
ingredients.bake_state: pre-cooked (jarred/canned), then baked, slightly golden edges
ingredients.realism_notes: Quartered artichoke hearts from jar. Pale green-yellow with darker outer leaves. Layered structure visible on cut side. Some pieces showing the fibrous interior. Not too many — artichokes are a premium topping. Golden-brown edges from oven.

ingredients.name: Spinat
ingredients.cut_style: whole small leaves, wilted and slightly compacted from baking
ingredients.bake_state: baked, wilted, reduced in volume, slightly darkened
ingredients.realism_notes: Wilted from heat — NOT fresh and crisp. Dark green, slightly compacted. Forms small clusters rather than even spread. Volume reduced by cooking. Some leaves darker than others. Not spread like a flat layer — has natural height and texture from wilting.

ingredients.name: Rucola
ingredients.cut_style: whole fresh leaves, loosely piled, airy and tall
ingredients.bake_state: RAW — added after baking, completely fresh and uncooked
ingredients.realism_notes: Added AFTER baking — must look 100% fresh, green, and alive. Airy pile of jagged rocket leaves. Not flat — has height and volume. Some leaves standing upright. Bright vivid green. Slight natural curl to leaves. Looks like just-picked arugula tossed on top. Premium restaurant presentation.

ingredients.name: Mais
ingredients.cut_style: individual kernels, loose
ingredients.bake_state: baked, slightly golden, some kernels with brown spots
ingredients.realism_notes: Individual corn kernels scattered across pizza. Bright yellow with some golden-brown spots from baking. Not in clumps — evenly scattered. Each kernel slightly different shade. Small and uniform in size. Cheerful, colorful accent.

ingredients.name: Ananas
ingredients.cut_style: small chunks or thin small triangles, not large rings
ingredients.bake_state: baked, slightly caramelized edges, golden
ingredients.realism_notes: Small bite-sized pieces, NOT large rings. Each piece 1-2cm. Some triangular, some irregular chunks. Edges slightly caramelized and golden from baking. Translucent pale yellow center. Not too many — controversial topping, used moderately. Slight browning on tips.

ingredients.name: Tomaten frisch
ingredients.cut_style: thin round slices or small wedges, showing seeds and chambers
ingredients.bake_state: raw or barely warmed — placed after or just before serving
ingredients.realism_notes: Fresh and vibrant, not heavily cooked. Thin slices showing seed chambers inside. Bright red with visible seeds and juice. Some slices overlapping slightly. Placed after baking so they look fresh. Slight moisture glistening on surface. Not sun-dried — fresh vine tomato.

ingredients.name: Kirschtomaten
ingredients.cut_style: halved, cut side up showing seed interior
ingredients.bake_state: lightly roasted or placed after baking, slightly blistered skin
ingredients.realism_notes: Cut in half showing the juicy seed interior. Placed cut-side up mostly. Deep red, glossy skin. Some with slight green stiel still attached. Mix of slightly roasted and fresh-looking. Small — each half about 1.5cm. Glistening and appetizing.

ingredients.name: Broccoli
ingredients.cut_style: very small florets, bite-sized, cut from the stem
ingredients.bake_state: blanched then baked, slightly charred tips
ingredients.realism_notes: Small florets only — no thick stems visible. Dark green with slightly charred yellow-brown tips from baking. Each floret 1-2cm. Not too many — used as accent. Some pieces showing the tree-like branching structure. Natural deep green color.

ingredients.name: Kapern
ingredients.cut_style: whole small buds, uncut
ingredients.bake_state: baked, slightly shriveled, intensified color
ingredients.realism_notes: Very small round buds, 4-6mm each. Used VERY sparingly — capers are a strong accent. Dark olive-green, slightly wrinkled from baking. Scattered randomly with lots of space between. Not in clusters. Each one a tiny dark sphere. Subtle garnish, not a main topping.

ingredients.name: Ei
ingredients.cut_style: cracked whole egg, showing runny yolk and set white
ingredients.bake_state: baked on pizza, white set but yolk still slightly runny
ingredients.realism_notes: One or two eggs cracked directly onto pizza and baked. White is set and slightly bubbly around edges. Yolk should look slightly runny or just-set, vibrant orange-yellow. Placed in center or slightly off-center. Not scrambled — whole cracked eggs. Natural irregular shape of a cracked egg. Realistic pizza fiorentina style.

ingredients.name: Mozzarella extra
ingredients.cut_style: torn pieces and small islands of fresh mozzarella, hand-torn
ingredients.bake_state: melted, bubbly, slightly browned spots
ingredients.realism_notes: Hand-torn fresh mozzarella pieces. When baked: melted pools with bubbly surface and light brown leopard spots. Creamy white base with golden-brown blistering. Some pieces more melted (flat pools), others retain slight height. Stringy cheese visible between pieces. Not uniform — organic torn shapes.

ingredients.name: Gorgonzola
ingredients.cut_style: small crumbled irregular chunks, creamy and soft
ingredients.bake_state: melted, slightly runny, cream-colored with blue veins
ingredients.realism_notes: Small crumbles of blue cheese, partially melted. Cream-white base with distinctive blue-green mold veins. Some pieces more melted than others. Creamy and rich looking. Not too much — strong cheese used sparingly. When melted, slightly runny and pooling. Blue veins more visible in less-melted pieces.

ingredients.name: Frischkäse
ingredients.cut_style: small clean dollops spooned on top
ingredients.bake_state: added after baking or just slightly warmed, still white and fresh
ingredients.realism_notes: Small teaspoon-sized dollops placed on top of finished pizza. Pure white, smooth, creamy texture. Not melted or browned — still fresh-looking. 5-7 small dollops scattered across surface. Each dollop has a natural spooned shape with slight peak. Clean and appetizing. Could be cream cheese, ricotta, or straciatella style.

ingredients.name: Parmesan/Grana
ingredients.cut_style: fine shavings, flakes, and thin curled spaene from a block
ingredients.bake_state: added after baking — fresh shavings, not melted
ingredients.realism_notes: Added AFTER baking as finishing touch. Thin elegant shavings and curled flakes from a parmesan block. Pale straw-yellow color. Some pieces curled, some flat flakes. Scattered loosely and elegantly. Dry and crystalline texture visible. Premium restaurant finishing touch. Not grated powder — visible shavings.
